name: Wild Rice Waldorf Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large tart apple, crisp, G. Smith
1 bell pepper, any color, seeded and diced
1/4 cup toasted almonds or walnuts, chopped or slivered
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan with a tight-fitting lid, soak the wild rice in 1 cup of hot water for 30 minutes.
2. Add the remaining 1 1/2 cups of water, bring to a boil.
3. Lower to a simmer, cover and cook for about 45 minutes, until the rice is tender.
4. When the rice has cooked for about 30 minutes, dice the apple and toss with the lemon juice in a large bowl.
5. Add the peppers, celery, red onions, currants or raisins, and almonds or walnuts to the bowl and set aside.
6. Whisk together all of the dressing ingredients.
7. Add the cooked rice and the dressing to the bowl and toss well to combine.
